# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Skia m151 sync and bug fixes**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 syncs upstream Skia m151 bug fixes and plugs a native resource leak.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia m151 upstream bug fixes merged** — Incorporates the latest chrome/m151 upstream bug fixes from the Skia engine. ([#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData** — SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) no longer leaks a native image handle when a subset rect is specified. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
